name: Chocolate Chiffon Cake/Low-Fat
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a small bowl, place cocoa powder.
3. Add boiling water and stir until smooth. Let the mixture cool completely.
4. In another bowl, sift flour, sugar, baking soda, and salt together.
5. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients and pour in the liquid butter sticks, egg beaters, vanilla extract, and cooled cocoa powder.
6. With an electric mixer, beat until smooth. Sprinkle cream of tartar over the egg whites.
7. Beat at high speed until stiff peaks form. Do not overbeat.
8. Gently fold the batter into the egg whites until just blended.
9. Pour the batter into a 10-inch tube pan and bake for 65-70 minutes.
10. Invert the pan over the neck of a bottle to cool completely, about 1 1/2 hours.
Per serving: Calories, 178; Fat, 0.15g; Cholesterol, 0mg; Sodium, 50mg. Source "Butter Busters" by Pam Mycoskie (1992)
